text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Hey-hey, are all you good kids doing well?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I'm reporting live from the Golshi Birthday 
Party at Tracen Academy!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Jordan! Tell me, what kinda present 
do you think Golshi would like?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
You have 0.1 seconds to answer. 
If you can't, I'll have to subject you to 
the new Golshi birthday technique☆

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
That sounds like you're dead set on 
subjecting someone to your technique…

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Geez… Wait, are you looking for a present?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Hmm… I can do nails if you wanna. 
Red would suit you ——

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
You sayin' you'll paint the likes of me red 
with your fingertips…!? I ain't taking that 
lying down!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I did not! You're really trying to force 
this technique thing, aren't you!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, whoa, you would doubt me? 
Alright then, let's settle this once and for all. 
Mixed style, winner takes all!!
